title: foundation — published macros
description: Framework-level macros registered by FoundationServiceProvider::boot() so every downstream module + migration can rely on them without an explicit dependency. Blueprint macros add columns / indexes via a single call; Str + Collection macros add ergonomics used across model + service code.
namespace_note: Blueprint macros extend `Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint`. Str + Collection macros extend Laravel's respective facades / classes.

macros.name: Blueprint::translations

columns.name: translations
columns.description: Content-translation JSONB blob. Shape: `{ locale: { field: value } }`. Read + written by the `HasTranslations` trait's accessors, which wrap `spatie/laravel-translatable` under the hood + layer on our attribute-driven metadata (#[Translatable]) + WorkspaceLocale-aware fallback.

macros.description: Adds the single JSONB column that carries per-locale translations of content fields on any model composing `Academorix\Localization\Concerns\HasTranslations`. The macro is IDEMPOTENT and safe to call in either `create` or `table` migrations.
macros.wire_shape: Standard: `data.name = 'Team'` (active-locale flat scalar). Admin editors request `?include=translations` to get the full `data.translations` blob for round-tripping.
macros.gin_index_note:
For workspaces that query translations by locale (rare), consumers may add a GIN index on the JSONB column via a follow-up migration:
`$t->index([DB::raw("(translations->'$locale')")], 'plans_translations_locale_gin', 'gin');`
Default behaviour is no index — reads always target the active locale via in-process accessor, no query planner participation needed.

macros.name: Blueprint::foundationConventions
macros.description: Applies the workspace-boundary + userstamps + metadata + audit + versionable + softDeletes + timestamps in canonical order. Convenience macro replacing 8 chained calls.

macros.name: Str::slugify
macros.description: Wraps Illuminate\Support\Str::slug with our diacritic map (Arabic / Cyrillic / CJK transliteration) so العربية → al-arabiyya (not empty).

macros.name: Collection::orderBySortable
macros.description: Sorts collection by the `sort_order` column of the underlying model (falls back to `created_at` when sort_order is null).

registration_order: AFTER all foundation service bindings are resolved (deferred registration) so migrations run during other providers' boot phase can call the macros safely.
